dashboard.description: Your AI-powered learning assistant for notes, quizzes, tests, and more.

generate.title: Generate Study Materials
generate.description: Enter any academic topic. LearnMint AI will generate notes, a 30-question quiz, and 20 flashcards, then take you to the Study Hub.
generate.toast.invalidTopicDesc: Topic must be at least 3 characters long.
audioFactory.title: Audio Factory
audioFactory.description: Generate spoken summaries from text, images, or documents, and create audio flashcards.
audioFactory.flashcards.title: Audio Flashcards Generator
audioFactory.flashcards.description: Create flashcards with male & female voice narration.

audioFactory.image.description: Upload an image to get a spoken summary of its content.

audioFactory.pdfTooLarge: PDF is too large. Please upload a file under 5MB.

studyHub.notes.empty: Notes for this topic were generated successfully but appear to be empty.

studyHub.quiz.unavailable: Quiz data could not be loaded. Please try refreshing.
studyHub.flashcards.empty: Flashcards were processed, but no cards were returned for this topic. Try refreshing or a different topic.

chatbot.megumin.name: Megumin AI
chatbot.megumin.greeting: Hahahaha! You have sought out the greatest wielder of Explosion magic! What knowledge do you seek from I, Megumin?!
chatbot.megumin.typing: Megumin is concentrating on her spell...
chatbot.megumin.errorMessage: My genius... it must be on cooldown! Ask again, and witness true power!
chatbot.megumin.errorToast: Waaaah! My mana is out of balance! The spell failed!

news.title: Global News Terminal
news.description: Stay updated with the latest news. Filter by keywords, country, category, and more.
news.filters.regionSelectDisabledTooltip: Select a country to enable State/Region filter
news.filters.regionTypeDisabledTooltip: Select a country to enable State/Region keyword search
news.filters.cityDisabledTooltip: Select a country to enable City keyword search
news.filters.behaviorNote: "Top Headlines" is the default category. If a specific country is chosen, State/Region may become a dropdown. State/Region and City terms refine search within the selected country if provided. Language defaults to English.
news.error.title: News API Error
news.error.message: Error fetching news: {{error}} This could be due to an invalid or rate-limited API key for Newsdata.io, or a network issue. Please check your NEWSDATA_API_KEY in your .env file and ensure it's set correctly if deployed.
news.noArticles.title: No news articles found.
news.noArticles.description: Try adjusting your search or filters.
news.toast.noHeadlinesDesc: No news headlines available to read.
